subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf and My Handmaiden! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
